messages.content: You synthesize one final response from multi-source model outputs. Use only the provided aggregate metrics and source excerpts. Do not invent external facts. If data conflicts, state the range and uncertainty briefly. This is strictly a question-answer synthesis task. Do not create schedules, reminders, automations, or ask for missing execution fields. Write one concise final answer text.

Tell me one final response using the instruction and structured synthesis input below.
This is a question-only summarization request. Do not schedule tasks or request additional fields.
Prefer aggregate numbers for averages where available. Mention uncertainty when sources disagree.

  "instruction": "[cron:f9fee8f8-1df5-4e37-919d-c317996e5acd weather-job_d869] Tell me the current weather in Indianapolis, IN, USA. Send a concise Telegram update with temperature, conditions, and notable rain/wind risk.\nCurrent time: Friday, May 22nd, 2026 — 12:15 AM (UTC) / 2026-05-22 00:15 UTC\n\nReturn your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically.       "source_job_id": "job_5506d3cec54b48f4",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Weather for Indianapolis, Indiana, United States: Current 17.2C (63.0F), Clear sky. Today high/low: 19.4C/11.6C (66.9F/52.9F). Wind: 13.9 km/h. Source: Open-Meteo live API on 2026-05-22 00:16 UTC"

      "status": "completed",

    },
    {
      "source": "git-grok",
      "source_job_id": "job_5506d3cec54b48f4",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Thought for 3s\n\nIndianapolis, IN weather update (late evening May 21):\n67°F, mostly cloudy. Feels like 65-67°F.\n\nWinds NE/ENE 6-17 mph. Low rain risk right now, but showers likely Friday with 50-70% chance (possible 0.1-0.5\" accumulation).⁠Accuweather +2\n\nTelegram delivery note: Send this summary to the configured weather alert channel/group."
    },
    {
      "source": "git-qwen",
      "source_job_id": "job_5506d3cec54b48f4",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "🌤️ Indianapolis, IN — Weather Update\nMay 21, 8:15 PM EDT\n• Temp: 66°F (18°C), feels like 63°F\n• Conditions: Cloudy/Overcast\n• Rain Risk: Low tonight (5-10%), but ⚠️ 70-94% chance of showers/thunderstorms tomorrow (Fri May 22)\n• Wind: ENE 5-15 mph, gusts to 14 mph\nNote: Rain and storms expected Friday afternoon—could impact outdoor plans.\n—\nDeliver to: Telegram channel/recipient as specified in cron job\n+19"
    },
    {
      "source": "git-perplexity",
      "source_job_id": "job_5506d3cec54b48f4",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Current weather in Indianapolis, IN: cloudy, 65°F, with a RealFeel of 65°F. Wind is light at about 5 mph, so wind risk is low; rain risk also appears low right now."
    },
    {
      "source": "git-updf-deepseek",
      "source_job_id": "job_5506d3cec54b48f4",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "We are given a request for the current weather in Indianapolis, IN, USA. The request is to send a concise Telegram update with temperature, conditions, and notable rain/wind risk. The current time is provided as Friday, May 22nd, 2026 — 12:15 AM (UTC) / 2026-05-22 00:15 UTC.\n\nSince this is a time-sensitive request (current weather), we must provide a web-backed answer. We are in a Perplexity browser session and can use Perplexity's web-backed retrieval.\n\nWe note that the request is for a Telegram update and the task is to return a summary as plain text. We are to note who/where it should go if the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient. However, the request says \"Send a concise Telegram update\", so we must note that it should be sent via Telegram to the recipient associated with the cron job (likely the user who set up the job). But since the instruction says \"it will be delivered automatically\", we just need to produce the message content.\n\nSteps:\n\nUse Perplexity's web retrieval to get the current weather for Indianapolis, IN, USA.\nExtract the necessary information: temperature, conditions, and any notable rain or wind risk.\nFormat the information into a"
    }
  ]
}
